source: finstack implementation (pending external validation via scripts/generate_cds_golden_vectors.py)
description: Standard 5Y CDS with flat 5% discount and 1% hazard rate at 40% recovery

par_spread_bp.notes: Par spread from finstack implementation. Theoretical: h*(1-R)*10000 ≈ 60 bp

risky_pv01.notes: Risky PV01 per bp in currency units

premium_leg_pv.notes: At par spread, premium leg ≈ protection leg

npv.notes: At stated spread (≈ par), NPV should be approximately zero
